name: MYRadiologyMHDDocumentSourceCapabilityStatement
title: MY Radiology MHD Document Source CapabilityStatement
publisher: Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia
description: Client capability expectations for a system that submits radiology documents to an MHD Document Recipient. Typical examples are a RIS acting as report source or a PACS or VNA submitting packaged study documents.

interaction.documentation: The Document Source assembles an ITI-65 transaction Bundle containing one SubmissionSet List, one or more DocumentReferences, and optional Binary resources carrying the document content.
